## Quality bar checklist

- [ ] Produces a real file output, not just printed text.
- [ ] Works on a clean machine with only Claude Code installed.
- [ ] Reads `friday/voice.md` if it exists and writes in the founder's voice.
- [ ] Appends to the `friday/` folder rather than overwriting unrelated files.
- [ ] Has no em dashes anywhere in the text.
- [ ] Tells the founder what to do next after it runs.
- [ ] `pytest tests/` run locally and green.

## Type of change

- [ ] New command
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other (describe above)
